reason: Acceptance criteria (§ Acceptance Criteria) and Definition of Done — the canonical pass/fail bar for any check.

Decision log D1-D10 — verify code matches locked decisions (AGPL license headers, MinerU as PDF default, /crystallize instead of auto-promote, no vector tier in v1, MCP only in Phase 4, telemetry opt-in).

Wiki schema contract — verify generated wiki has correct directory layout (raw/extracts/state/wiki), required page types (papers/concepts/queries with frontmatter), queries/ isolation discipline (no auto-feed-back to index/log).
BabelDOC contract — verify subprocess isolation, version pin to 0.6.2, mono+dual export wiring, WS event schema match.

Document pipeline routing — verify .pdf goes to MinerU, .docx/.pptx/.xlsx/.html go to markitdown, GROBID is feature-flagged. Verify license attribution NOTICE file lists MinerU/markitdown/GROBID terms.
